name: Idle Tiers
short_description: A real idle game with more than 2000 upgrades and deep management
detailed_description:
IDLE TIERS is a real idle game with endless possibilities and addictive gameplay. Unlock hundreds of generators to produce passive income! Use 5 different currencies to purchase various upgrades. Invest into base, global or prestige upgrades. Unlock different production tiers to maximize income.

GAMEPLAY

Upgrade generators, unlock new tiers, buy various upgrades, manage your economy with five different currencies

UPGRADES

More than 2000 various upgrades are available! Upgrade each generator one by one or purchase powerful global impruvements

MANAGEMENT

Find your own way to maximize income. Buy all upgrades or choose one specific strategy. You can do whatever you want!

CUSTOMIZATION

Nice minimalistic UI with possibility to switch between light or dark themes, toggle on or off visual effects and control FPS

EXTRA FEATURES

Steam achievements, detailed statistics, possibility to complete the game and many more!
